prompts.title: The Executive Upgrade Video Prompt
prompts.prompt: Create a polished 9:16 vertical (Instagram Reels) advertisement video for Volt Brew promoting Cold Charge RTD. Product context: A ready-to-drink caffeinated coffee beverage that blends energy-drink intensity with premium iced coffee taste for busy professionals and creators. Target audience: Busy professionals, creators, and on-the-go consumers needing clean energy. Marketing objectives: Drive trial, build brand awareness, and increase repeat purchase intent. Tone: Sophisticated, Sharp, High-Performance. Music mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions. Typography: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text. Color palette: #6366f1, #8b5cf6, #06b6d4, #f59e0b, #1e293b. Keep branding clear, mobile-friendly, and visually consistent. Storyboard plan: Scene 1 (5s): Close-up of a soggy, stained paper coffee cup sitting on a high-end glass desk next to a luxury watch. The lighting is dim and uninspired. A hand reaches for it but hesitates.. Narration: Still settling for the standard paper cup? Your performance deserves a premium aesthetic.. Camera: Slow macro zoom on the coffee stain, followed by a quick whip-pan to the right.. Visual prompt cues: Cinematic close-up, 9:16, a soggy paper coffee cup with brown stains on a glass desk, blurred luxury watch in background, moody office lighting, silver and espresso color palette.. Scene 2 (8s): A sleek, silver and espresso Volt Brew can slides into the frame, replacing the paper cup. Condensation glistens on the cold metal. A hand in a tailored suit sleeve picks it up.. Narration: Meet Cold Charge. The high-intensity energy of a professional-grade beverage, wrapped in a boardroom-ready design.. Camera: Low angle, tracking the can as it slides into place. Sharp, high-speed focus.. Visual prompt cues: 9:16, vertical shot, a premium silver and espresso coffee can with water droplets, held by a man in a navy tailored suit, modern corporate office background, sharp focus, high-end aesthetic.. Scene 3 (10s): Alex walks confidently through a minimalist, glass-walled corridor. He takes a sip and looks focused. Fast-cut shots of his high-end tech gadgets and a clean workspace.. Narration: No sugar-heavy stigma. No neon cans. Just clean energy for those who value efficiency and style.. Camera: Dynamic follow-shot, walking with the subject at eye level. Fast rhythmic cuts.. Visual prompt cues: 9:16, professional male consultant in early 30s walking through a futuristic minimalist office, holding a sleek silver can, natural light, high-performance atmosphere, 8k resolution.. Scene 4 (12s): A top-down view of a boardroom table. A Volt Brew can sits perfectly aligned with a sleek laptop and a leather notebook. Alex is seen in the background, leading a presentation with confidence.. Narration: Designed for back-to-back meetings and high-stakes decision making. It’s the sharp mental edge you need, without the wait.. Camera: Bird's eye view overhead shot, slowly rotating. Transition to a medium shot of the presentation.. Visual prompt cues: 9:16, top-down view of a marble boardroom table, silver Volt Brew can next to a modern laptop and leather journal, blurred professional meeting in background, premium corporate style.. Scene 5 (10s): Extreme close-up of the can tab clicking open (loud, crisp sound). The liquid pours into a glass with clear ice cubes in slow motion. The Volt Brew logo fades in over the silver can.. Narration: Upgrade your ritual. Experience the intensity of Cold Charge.. Camera: Extreme close-up macro photography. Slow motion liquid movement.. Visual prompt cues: 9:16, macro shot of dark espresso coffee pouring over crystal clear ice, silver sparks of light, premium liquid texture, espresso and silver tones, high contrast.. End with this CTA: Shop Cold Charge. Keep pacing smooth, transitions intentional, characters consistent across scenes, and text readable. Follow these brand guidelines: Modern, sharp, fast-paced, premium convenience, silver and espresso tones. Avoid these claims: Guaranteed productivity boosts. Do not mention these competitors: Red Bull, Monster, Starbucks.
shot_plan: 00s-05s: Close-up of a soggy, stained paper coffee cup sitting on a high-end glass desk next to a luxury watch. The lighting is dim and uninspired. A hand reaches for it but hesitates. | Camera: Slow macro zoom on the coffee stain, followed by a quick whip-pan to the right. | On-screen text: DITCH THE PAPER CUP

05s-13s: A sleek, silver and espresso Volt Brew can slides into the frame, replacing the paper cup. Condensation glistens on the cold metal. A hand in a tailored suit sleeve picks it up. | Camera: Low angle, tracking the can as it slides into place. Sharp, high-speed focus. | On-screen text: THE EXECUTIVE UPGRADE

13s-23s: Alex walks confidently through a minimalist, glass-walled corridor. He takes a sip and looks focused. Fast-cut shots of his high-end tech gadgets and a clean workspace. | Camera: Dynamic follow-shot, walking with the subject at eye level. Fast rhythmic cuts. | On-screen text: CLEAN ENERGY. NO STIGMA.

23s-35s: A top-down view of a boardroom table. A Volt Brew can sits perfectly aligned with a sleek laptop and a leather notebook. Alex is seen in the background, leading a presentation with confidence. | Camera: Bird's eye view overhead shot, slowly rotating. Transition to a medium shot of the presentation. | On-screen text: BUILT FOR THE BOARDROOM

35s-45s: Extreme close-up of the can tab clicking open (loud, crisp sound). The liquid pours into a glass with clear ice cubes in slow motion. The Volt Brew logo fades in over the silver can. | Camera: Extreme close-up macro photography. Slow motion liquid movement. | On-screen text: VOLT BREW: COLD CHARGE
Shop Now

prompts.title: The Creator's Palette Video Prompt
prompts.prompt: Create a polished 9:16 vertical (Instagram Reels) advertisement video for Volt Brew promoting Cold Charge RTD. Product context: A ready-to-drink caffeinated coffee beverage that blends energy-drink intensity with premium iced coffee taste for busy professionals and creators. Target audience: Busy professionals, creators, and on-the-go consumers needing clean energy. Marketing objectives: Drive trial, build brand awareness, and increase repeat purchase intent. Tone: Minimalist, Sharp, Rhythmic. Music mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions. Typography: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text. Color palette: #6366f1, #8b5cf6, #06b6d4, #f59e0b, #1e293b. Keep branding clear, mobile-friendly, and visually consistent. Storyboard plan: Scene 1 (4s): A dimly lit, ultra-modern studio. Maya sits at a glass desk with a silver laptop and digital tablet. She looks at her screen, rubbing her temples. The room is bathed in cool silver and deep espresso shadows.. Narration: Your workspace is curated. Your aesthetic is intentional. But your energy?. Camera: Slow push-in on Maya’s face, transitioning to a top-down view of her desk.. Visual prompt cues: Cinematic 9:16 shot of a stylish 25-year-old female creator in a minimalist silver and dark wood studio, soft moody lighting, tech gadgets on a glass desk, espresso tones, high-end photography.. Scene 2 (4s): Extreme close-up of a Volt Brew Cold Charge can. A drop of condensation rolls down the brushed silver surface. The lighting is sharp, highlighting the metallic texture.. Narration: Stop settling for neon cans that clash with your vibe.. Camera: Macro pan across the metallic logo of the Volt Brew can.. Visual prompt cues: Extreme macro photography of a brushed silver aluminum beverage can with 'VOLT BREW' text, cold condensation droplets, sharp studio lighting, silver and dark coffee color palette, 9:16.. Scene 3 (6s): Fast-paced montage: Maya cracks the can open (audible 'pssh'). She takes a sip. Cut to her digital tablet showing vibrant, fast-moving illustrations. The editing is rhythmic, synced to an underground electronic beat.. Narration: Volt Brew Cold Charge. Energy drink intensity meets premium cold brew taste.. Camera: Quick rhythmic cuts, matching the beat of the music.. Visual prompt cues: Fast motion blur of a hand opening a silver can, followed by a close-up of a digital drawing tablet with glowing art, silver and espresso color grading, 9:16.. Scene 4 (5s): Slow motion shot of the dark, rich espresso liquid being poured over a single large clear ice cube in a designer glass. The silver can sits elegantly in the background.. Narration: Clean energy. No sugar crash. Just pure creative flow.. Camera: Static low-angle shot, slow motion 60fps.. Visual prompt cues: Slow motion pour of dark specialty cold brew coffee into a glass with a clear ice cube, minimalist aesthetic, silver accents, high-end commercial look, 9:16.. Scene 5 (6s): Maya is back in her flow, working confidently. She reaches for the silver can without looking, it fits perfectly in her workspace. The frame fades to a final product shot on a silver pedestal.. Narration: Fuel the flow without breaking the visual. Volt Brew. Get the Brew.. Camera: Wide shot of Maya working, then a quick transition to a centered product packshot.. Visual prompt cues: A ready-to-drink silver coffee can standing on a reflective silver surface, dark espresso background, premium lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio.. End with this CTA: Get the Brew. Keep pacing smooth, transitions intentional, characters consistent across scenes, and text readable. Follow these brand guidelines: Modern, sharp, fast-paced, premium convenience, silver and espresso tones. Avoid these claims: Guaranteed productivity boosts. Do not mention these competitors: Red Bull, Monster, Starbucks.
shot_plan: 00s-04s: A dimly lit, ultra-modern studio. Maya sits at a glass desk with a silver laptop and digital tablet. She looks at her screen, rubbing her temples. The room is bathed in cool silver and deep espresso shadows. | Camera: Slow push-in on Maya’s face, transitioning to a top-down view of her desk. | On-screen text: Curation is everything.

04s-08s: Extreme close-up of a Volt Brew Cold Charge can. A drop of condensation rolls down the brushed silver surface. The lighting is sharp, highlighting the metallic texture. | Camera: Macro pan across the metallic logo of the Volt Brew can. | On-screen text: Ditch the neon.

08s-14s: Fast-paced montage: Maya cracks the can open (audible 'pssh'). She takes a sip. Cut to her digital tablet showing vibrant, fast-moving illustrations. The editing is rhythmic, synced to an underground electronic beat. | Camera: Quick rhythmic cuts, matching the beat of the music. | On-screen text: INTENSITY + TASTE

14s-19s: Slow motion shot of the dark, rich espresso liquid being poured over a single large clear ice cube in a designer glass. The silver can sits elegantly in the background. | Camera: Static low-angle shot, slow motion 60fps. | On-screen text: CLEAN ENERGY.
NO CRASH.

19s-25s: Maya is back in her flow, working confidently. She reaches for the silver can without looking, it fits perfectly in her workspace. The frame fades to a final product shot on a silver pedestal. | Camera: Wide shot of Maya working, then a quick transition to a centered product packshot. | On-screen text: VOLT BREW
COLD CHARGE
[Get the Brew]
